en.value: 1.1.1Interaction, meetings, workshop, and dialogue between CSOs, communities and local government on food/nutrition security schemes, financial services , insurance schemes and technologies resources issues among government, policy makers, parliamentary and other stakeholder  1.1.7Develop LDCRP in working Wards/Municipalities in collaboration with local government  1.1.8Study and research on indigenous crops, climate friendly technologies, climate change adaptation, high value crops and market jointly with university, LI-BIRD  and government research
